info.description: Digital Infrastructure for Sri Lankan Schools
info.title: OpenSchool API

get.description: Retrieve all academic years ordered by start date
Retrieve the academic year marked as current
Get all classes for a specific academic year

delete.description: Delete an academic year by ID

put.description: Mark an academic year as the current one; clears the previous current

post.description: Create a new class for a grade and academic year

get.description: Get all classes for the current academic year
Get a single class by its ID

put.description: Update class name or form teacher

delete.description: Delete a class if no students are enrolled

put.description: Assign a form teacher to a class

get.description: Get all subject teachers assigned to a class

post.description: Assign a teacher to teach a subject in a class

get.description: Retrieve all grades ordered by sort_order then name

put.description: Update a grade's name or sort order by ID

delete.description: Delete a grade by ID; blocked if the grade is assigned to any class

get.description: Retrieve the school record for this instance

post.description: Create the school record for this instance

put.description: Update the school record by ID

get.description: Retrieve all streams ordered by name

post.description: Create a new A/L stream (e.g. Science, Commerce, Arts)

put.description: Update a stream's name by ID

delete.description: Delete a stream by ID; blocked if the stream is assigned to any class

get.description: Retrieve all groups belonging to a stream

post.description: Create a sub-group under a stream (e.g. Bio, Maths under Science)

get.description: Retrieve a stream group by ID

put.description: Update a stream group's name by ID

delete.description: Delete a stream group by ID; blocked if the group is assigned to any class

get.description: Retrieve all subjects ordered by name

post.description: Create a new subject with a unique name and code

put.description: Update a subject's name and code by ID

delete.description: Delete a subject by ID; blocked if the subject is assigned to a grade, class, or student selection

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and your JWT token. Example: "Bearer eyJhbGci..."
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
